system.flavor: You release a fierce kick, bouncing shockwaves off the very stone.
system.effect:
Area Effect: 2 damage.
Effect [X]: If an object is in the exact end space of the line, this shockwave rebounds, dealing 2 damage again to all characters in the area and slowing one character in the area. Then push that object 1d3 spaces.
Dominant may extend or reduce the line by up to 2 spaces.
